name: 7th Inning Hot Dogs
recipeIngredient: 2 8 oz. cans refrigerated crescent dinner rolls
8 Cheese-filled or regular wieners, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 375°F.
2. Separate dough into 8 rectangles and firmly press perforations to seal.
3. Cut each rectangle in half lengthwise.
4. Place a wiener half lengthwise on one end of the dough strip.
5. Fold dough in half over the wiener; press short edges to seal, leaving sides open.
6. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 375°F for 11-13 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Serve with ketchup, mustard and pickle relish, if desired.
Yield: 16 servings
